concerns.location: tasks.md:User Story 1 - Data Ingestion & Cleaning Pipeline
concerns.text: Task T018 (Add validation for minimum 50 unique perovskite compositions) directly addresses SC-001, but no task explicitly addresses the provenance verification requirement in FR-010 (verifying peer-reviewed/NIST source). While T015 mentions source reference validation, it's not clear if it covers the full scope of FR-010.

concerns.location: tasks.md:User Story 2 - Structural Descriptor Calculation & Correlation Analysis
concerns.text: No tasks explicitly address FR-009 (sensitivity analysis on p-value thresholds). This should be a dedicated task within User Story 2.
